proposal_treasury.txt.notes: 15% treasury allocation in one shot is too aggressive. Liquidity mining incentives are legitimate but the proposal lacks vesting schedule, performance milestones, and a circuit breaker if TVL targets aren't met. Directionally correct, needs guardrails.

proposal_upgrade.txt.notes: Quadratic voting via UUPS proxy is a well-understood upgrade path. Proxy pattern is standard, timelock is mentioned, and the governance improvement justifies the complexity. Security surface is bounded.

proposal_access.txt.notes: Granting emergency pause to a 3-of-5 multisig is best practice. Strictly scoped to pause only, no fund movement. Adds a meaningful safety net with appropriate key distribution.

proposal_bugbounty.txt.notes: 50K USDC cap with 90-day scope, no new on-chain permissions, standard responsible disclosure policy. Low risk, clear upside in catching vulnerabilities before they're exploited. Straightforward approval.

proposal_mintingpower.txt.notes: Unrestricted MINT_ROLE to a single EOA with no timelock, no multisig, no cap, no expiry is a critical governance failure. This is essentially unlimited token dilution on demand from one address. Hard reject regardless of who the address belongs to.
